retry_reason: Failure indicates device not found, missing device node, or module not loaded; conditions may be permanent, so retry is not guaranteed to succeed and is not part of the wrapper contract.
contract_summary: This function acquires a reference to the NPU device for a consumer. It looks up the NPU device by phandle, obtains the platform device, increments the module reference count, attaches a device link from consumer to supplier, and returns the NPU private data. The caller obtains a valid pointer to an airoha_npu structure with the supplier device and module pinned. The caller must eventually call a matching put function (presumably airoha_npu_put) to release the module reference and device link. On error, ERR_PTR is returned and no references are held.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to acquire a reference to the NPU device for a consumer, including module pinning and device link creation. The function's main logic is to locate, reference, and return the NPU private data; DT parsing and link creation serve this get-wrapper purpose.

check.reason: try_module_get(THIS_MODULE) increments the module's reference count (THIS_MODULE.refcnt). The global variable THIS_MODULE is of type struct module, which has an atomic_t refcnt field. The access path and type chain are consistent with the code.
